mapper.sql: id, title, target_id, family_user_id, demand_type, urgency, required_skill, time_requirement, expected_start_time, expected_end_time, description, service_address, contact_person, contact_phone, status, reviewer_id, review_time, review_comment, task_id, attachment_url, intended_volunteer_id, created_at, updated_at

d.id, d.title, d.target_id, d.family_user_id, d.demand_type, d.urgency, d.required_skill, d.time_requirement, d.expected_start_time, d.expected_end_time, d.description, d.service_address, d.contact_person, d.contact_phone, d.status, d.reviewer_id, d.review_time, d.review_comment, d.task_id, d.attachment_url, d.intended_volunteer_id, d.created_at, d.updated_at, fu.id as fu_id, fu.username as fu_username, fu.full_name as fu_full_name, fu.phone as fu_phone, fu.email as fu_email, rv.id as rv_id, rv.username as rv_username, rv.full_name as rv_full_name, ht.id as ht_id, ht.name as ht_name, ht.archive_no as ht_archive_no, ht.family_address as ht_family_address, iv.id as iv_id, iv.user_id as iv_user_id, iv_user.full_name as iv_full_name, iv_user.phone as iv_phone, iv.skills as iv_skills
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO demand ( title, target_id, family_user_id, demand_type, urgency, required_skill, time_requirement, expected_start_time, expected_end_time, description, service_address, contact_person, contact_phone, status, attachment_url, intended_volunteer_id ) VALUES ( #{title}, #{targetId}, #{familyUserId}, #{demandType}, #{urgency}, #{requiredSkill}, #{timeRequirement}, #{expectedStartTime}, #{expectedEndTime}, #{description}, #{serviceAddress}, #{contactPerson}, #{contactPhone}, #{status}, #{attachmentUrl}, #{intendedVolunteerId} )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM demand d LEFT JOIN sys_user fu ON d.family_user_id = fu.id LEFT JOIN sys_user rv ON d.reviewer_id = rv.id LEFT JOIN help_target ht ON d.target_id = ht.id LEFT JOIN volunteer_profile iv ON d.intended_volunteer_id = iv.id LEFT JOIN sys_user iv_user ON iv.user_id = iv_user.id WHERE d.id = #{id}

SELECT FROM demand d LEFT JOIN sys_user fu ON d.family_user_id = fu.id LEFT JOIN sys_user rv ON d.reviewer_id = rv.id LEFT JOIN help_target ht ON d.target_id = ht.id LEFT JOIN volunteer_profile iv ON d.intended_volunteer_id = iv.id LEFT JOIN sys_user iv_user ON iv.user_id = iv_user.id ORDER BY d.created_at DESC

SELECT FROM demand d LEFT JOIN sys_user fu ON d.family_user_id = fu.id LEFT JOIN sys_user rv ON d.reviewer_id = rv.id LEFT JOIN help_target ht ON d.target_id = ht.id LEFT JOIN volunteer_profile iv ON d.intended_volunteer_id = iv.id LEFT JOIN sys_user iv_user ON iv.user_id = iv_user.id WHERE d.family_user_id = #{familyUserId} ORDER BY d.created_at DESC

SELECT FROM demand d LEFT JOIN sys_user fu ON d.family_user_id = fu.id LEFT JOIN sys_user rv ON d.reviewer_id = rv.id LEFT JOIN help_target ht ON d.target_id = ht.id LEFT JOIN volunteer_profile iv ON d.intended_volunteer_id = iv.id LEFT JOIN sys_user iv_user ON iv.user_id = iv_user.id WHERE d.status = #{status} ORDER BY d.created_at DESC

SELECT FROM demand d LEFT JOIN sys_user fu ON d.family_user_id = fu.id LEFT JOIN sys_user rv ON d.reviewer_id = rv.id LEFT JOIN help_target ht ON d.target_id = ht.id LEFT JOIN volunteer_profile iv ON d.intended_volunteer_id = iv.id LEFT JOIN sys_user iv_user ON iv.user_id = iv_user.id WHERE d.status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY d.urgency DESC, d.created_at ASC

SELECT FROM demand d LEFT JOIN sys_user fu ON d.family_user_id = fu.id LEFT JOIN sys_user rv ON d.reviewer_id = rv.id LEFT JOIN help_target ht ON d.target_id = ht.id LEFT JOIN volunteer_profile iv ON d.intended_volunteer_id = iv.id LEFT JOIN sys_user iv_user ON iv.user_id = iv_user.id WHERE d.status = 'APPROVED' ORDER BY d.urgency DESC, d.expected_start_time ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM demand WHERE family_user_id = #{familyUserId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM demand WHERE status = #{status}
mapper.update: UPDATE demand SET task_id = #{taskId}, status = 'MATCHED' WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT demand_type AS type, COUNT(*) AS count FROM demand GROUP BY demand_type
